Thibaut Courtois said he was surprised by Antonio Conte's decision to substitute Eden Hazard in Chelsea's defeat against Manchester United on Sunday.

Hazard was taken off by Conte in the 73rd minute, just two minutes before Jesse Lingard scored the winner in a 2-1 defeat at Old Trafford. And that move confused the Chelsea goalkeeper.

"I don't have any explanation concerning Eden's substitution," Courtois told Play Sports. "I didn't expect him to go off, but it was the coach's decision. It would be good for him to explain it because I can't look inside his head."

高圖爾斯質疑干地：唔知佢諗咩！

【now.com體育】車路士門將泰拔高圖爾斯突然公開質疑領隊干地，令今夏離隊的傳聞升溫。

車路士上仗作客曼聯以1:2遭反勝，干地在1:1時令人意外地把王牌翼鋒夏薩特調離場，連泰拔高圖爾斯（Thibaut Courtois）也摸不著頭腦：「我真的解釋不到為甚麼夏薩特被換出，我沒有預計到，這是領隊的決定，他一定要解釋，我不知道他到底想甚麼。」

高圖爾斯跟車路士的合約只餘下18個月，但仍然未就續約一事達成共識。據知車仔已開出一紙20萬鎊周薪的新合約，只待這名比利時國腳首肯，而雙方原本在2月會重新傾續約，但高圖爾斯方面卻出「拖字闕」，把會談延期。

高圖爾斯早前曾表示希望回到馬德里生活，以跟於當地的女兒團聚，而皇家馬德里一直都希望把這名曾效力馬德里體育會的門將帶到班拿貝。如今高圖爾斯公開落干地面，令離隊上「馬」的機會大大增加。

圖片來源 : ©AFP

Courtois合約情況:

上一次球會正式接觸Courtois傾續約係12月既事，但雙方未能就合約條款達成協議而暫停談判。

Courtois父親同PSG代表係星期一進行過會面，不過唔係咩正式既轉會談判，目前Courtois只係想比多幾個option自己選擇，仲未作出任何決定。

Courtois早前透露會係2月份會同球會會面，不過雙方同意目前唔係一個合適既時間去傾合約，預計下個月會重啟談判。

若果Courtois決定離隊，球會都已經有幾個target係手，其中包括羅馬Alisson同史篤城Butland。Butland係車路士既長期目標，2013年Butland曾經拒絕過車路士，傳聞車路士一直仲有留意佢表現。

https://www.standard.co.uk/sport/football/thibaut-courtois-chelsea-contract-talks-on-hold-as-real-madrid-keep-tabs-a3776881.html

https://www.standard.co.uk/sport/football/chelsea-star-gary-cahill-set-for-unwelcome-hattrick-but-still-dreaming-of-world-cup-a3779921.html

Gary Cahill is the oldest outfield player in Chelsea’s squad but he will be feeling the tension the most before Antonio Conte picks his team to face Manchester City.

The Chelsea captain has already suffered the seismic blow of being named on the bench for the huge games against Barcelona and Manchester United.

If Conte decides to make it a very unwelcome hat-trick for Cahill against the League leaders at Etihad Stadium on Sunday, the 32-year-old will have even more cause for concern.

Cahill does not want to be sitting on the sidelines and it is not just because professional pride is at stake.

He has won six trophies in as many years at the club and is desperate to help Chelsea add to that tally in the FA Cup and Champions League this season, as well as secure a top-four finish in the Premier League.

However, not featuring for Chelsea could also have ramifications for his World Cup dream this summer, with England coach Gareth Southgate understandably wanting to select those individuals who are playing regularly.

Cahill told Chelsea’s official magazine recently: “We all know there is a World Cup at the end of the season so I have a target there where I need to be in form, fit and ready to play a big part in that tournament if I possibly can.”

The problem for Cahill is that younger men are putting his position under threat at club and international level.

At Chelsea, 24-year-old summer signing Antonio Rudiger has been increasingly favoured in recent weeks to play in the back three alongside Andreas Christensen, who is three years younger that the German.

There is also the challenge being posed by the prodigious talent of 17-year-old Ethan Ampadu, while Chelsea are looking to bolster their defence by buying Newcastle skipper Jamaal Lascelles in the next transfer window.

It should not be forgotten, either, that Kurt Zouma, who is on a season-long loan at Stoke, could be recalled next term.

But you do not get to have the career Cahill has had without great strength of mind and the centre-half is convinced he still has a lot to offer.

He added: “When you’re in the season, you’re always fighting against something — fighting to play, to keep hold of the shirt, with people ready to take it.

“There are only a few of us in the squad over 30 but we can bring that experience, we can pass it on.

“These are the players who have won a lot and been through many games in the Premier League and Champions League, as well as internationals. These players can help the younger boys achieve that as well.”

Cahill, who has just one year left on his deal, can be forgiven if he has a sense of deja vu.

After all, close friend and Chelsea legend John Terry was phased out the team last season and left for Aston Villa

Terry is the club’s most successful captain and Cahill has had the difficult honour of succeeding him.

“I always joked about it with my family,” said Cahill. “That’s the ‘taking over from the Sir Alex Ferguson role’.

“Whoever took it on, it was going to be huge pressure and arguably no captain will emulate what he did at the club.”

Everyone associated with the Blues is under strain right now, though. They are two points outside the top four and Tottenham and Liverpool can extend their lead over them before the match against Manchester City.

On the last occasion these sides met, Chelsea barely got a kick as Pep Guardiola’s men won 1-0 at Stamford Bridge. Conte blamed the lack of preparation, with his side playing less than 72 hours earlier at Atletico Madrid. He cannot use that excuse this time. Chelsea have had a clear week, whereas City took on Arsenalon Thursday.
Conte reports that David Luiz, Bakayoko and Ampadu are unavailable for Sunday's game due to injury.

【now.com體育】曼城周日將於主場迎戰車路士，曼城只要贏多4場就能在封王，而他們還有10場比賽的時間，改寫6個車路士保持的英超紀錄。

1. 最多勝仗—30場
去季車路士在干地領軍下，38戰取得30勝，以7分力壓次席的熱刺封王。曼城目前以28戰24勝暫列榜首，只要在餘下10場比賽贏得7場就能打破紀錄。

2. 最多客場勝仗—15場
藍戰士於2004/05年球季，在摩佬首次帶領車路士時，贏得19場客戰當中的15場，該季他們更拋離阿仙奴12分封王。曼城目前已贏得11場作客賽事，只要贏得餘下的作客賽事，包括對史篤城、愛華頓、熱刺、韋斯咸及修咸頓，就能以16場作客勝仗超越車路士。

3. 最多入球—103球
車路士於2009/10年球季在安察洛堤領軍下，以103個入球捧起該季英超獎盃。目前曼城在28戰當中已攻入82球，他們只要在餘下10場比賽攻入22球就能壓倒車仔。

4. 最大得失球差—71球
同樣是2009/10年球季，該季車路士的得失球差為71球。而曼城目前的得失球差為62球。

5. 最多主場入球—68球
又是2009/10年球季，該季車路士在史丹福橋球場攻入了68球。而目前曼城在14場主場賽事中攻入了50球，要打破紀錄，他們就要在周日主場對車路士，以及其餘主場賽事，包括對曼聯、史雲斯、哈特斯菲爾德和白禮頓中，攻入多19球。

6.最高積分—95分
這個紀錄是在2004/05年球季在摩佬帶領下創下，該季他們以12分力壓阿仙奴封王。目前曼城得75分，今季他們仍有30分可以爭取，只要他們取多21分就可以改寫歷史。
